item.title: Affordable IT Services for Individuals
item.description:
🌐 Explore the digital world with my help!

I offer you a range of computing services designed to make your life easier. I am happy to offer my help and expertise to anyone who has limited resources, cannot afford very expensive “professional” services, but needs some form of one-off or even regular help at an affordable price. It is in this area that I offer my services as a private individual, in a field where most service providers do not offer help.

My Background: With over 8 years of experience in IT customer and desktop support, I have honed my skills as a Remote Desktop Manager Specialist. Throughout my career, I have successfully assisted a diverse range of clients, addressing a variety of IT challenges with precision and dedication.

I have provided comprehensive support to both business clients and personal acquaintances in the following areas:

  • Desktop Support: Proficient in Windows XP, 7, 10, 11, and Linux desktop operating systems.
  • Software Support: Expertise in Microsoft Office, software installation and removal, and basic scripting/CLI usage.
  • Remote Access Solutions: Experienced with Citrix and remote OS installation utilizing SCCM, as well as supporting virtual desktop infrastructure (VDI), or individual support via TeamViewer.
  • Network Support: Skilled in managing VPN connectivity and resolving network-related issues.
  • User Management: Proficient in Active Directory user and computer management, handling user profiles.
  • Hardware Support: Extensive experience in supporting laptops, PCs, and mobile devices, including printer and thin client support.

My approach combines technical expertise with a commitment to customer service, allowing me to effectively resolve issues while fostering positive relationships with my clients. I am passionate about leveraging technology to enhance user experiences.

My services include:

  • Training & Education:
    • 🖥️Computer Education -Unlock the potential of technology with our comprehensive computer education program. We offer tailored courses ranging from basic digital literacy to advanced software applications. Outcome: By the end of the program, you will confidently navigate various software, significantly improving your productivity and enhancing your success opportunities.
    • 🔒Security Education -In an increasingly digital world, understanding online safety is paramount. We provide in-depth security education that covers essential practices including password management, recognizing phishing attempts, and safe browsing techniques. Outcome: You will develop proactive strategies to enhance your online safety and mitigate risks of cyber threats, ensuring your personal and professional data remains secure.
  • Technical Support:
    • 🔧Hardware and Software Help -Experiencing issues with your computer? I offer you assitance for both hardware and software problems. From troubleshooting to resolving complex issues, I’ve got you covered. Outcome: You will enjoy a fully operational system with minimized downtime, allowing you to focus on your tasks without technical interruptions.
  • Installation & Maintenance:
    • 💻Building Desktop Computers and Installing Operating Systems -Get professional help in setting up your operating systems for optimal performance. I specialize in customizing installations based on the specific needs of your hardware and software environment. Outcome: You will have a properly configured and efficient operating system tailored to your needs, improving overall system performance and stability.
    • 💾Data Backup -Protect your valuable information with our robust data backup solutions. I assess your needs and implement backup strategies that ensure data is secure yet easily accessible when you need it. Outcome: You will gain peace of mind knowing that your critical data is safely backed up, reducing the risk of loss due to unexpected circumstances.
  • Consultation:
    • 🗣️Advice -Leverage my expert knowledge and experience in technology management through personalized consultation services. Whether you need guidance on software choices or IT strategy planning, I provide targeted advice. Outcome: You will walk away with a clear, actionable plan tailored to your specific technology needs and business objectives.

Why choose me?

I have many years of experience in the world of computing, I have assisted clients, friends, family, acquaintances, they all call me when they have computing problems. My focus on affordability, a patient approach with elderly clients, or my expertise in open-source software are my key strengts. I can help you learn about open source software, find what you didn’t know you needed, and all this affordably. Flexible services, customized solutions, by appointment and agreement. I don’t promise you the stars from the night sky, but I do promise you that I will do my best to serve you and find the right help and solutions to your problems.

Ready to explore the digital world together? Email me today to schedule your free consultation!

Contact me by e-mail at wienerhumor@gmail.com. If you write and leave your phone number, I will be happy to call you and we can schedule an appointment for a consultation.
